creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sudo 1.8.4p2 is out, [1].  FreeBSD's sudo is at 1.8.3p2, [2], [3].

[1] http://www.courtesan.com/sudo/
[2] http://www.freshports.org/security/sudo
[3] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/security/sudo/Makefile

Fix: 

The patch is available at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/sudo/update-1.8.3p2-to-1.8.4p2.diff
QA page is at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/qa/security/sudo/1.8.4

Tinderbox builds are fine, my local testing revealed no problems.
Will request a wider testing in freebsd-ports@, results will be
reported into this PR.
How-To-Repeat: 
Look at [1], [2] and [3].
